    titleThe Infestation: Part 4
    typekill
    completeDescriptionAccording to Ono's latest research she has discovered that the Macrophagse are a vital part of the infestation. She wants to study them up close and she insists that we take her to Polueno in the Zergilin system.
    nextMissionnsOxXmBlqUGVL3gJysWtig
    availableYes
    maxLvl0
    keyNbWNvoCBOEu2ijHGsJpfaA
    descriptionKill 100 moths to decrease the infestation rate and help Ono in her research. She believes something evil is behind the spread of the infestation and she wants to find out what it is.
